publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2021-03-01 18:01:02 -0500.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

origination.label: creator
origination.corpname: Cornell University. Libraries. John M. Olin Library. Circulation Department

did.physdesc: Reports, policies, records, meeting minutes, tally sheets, manuals, evaluations.
did.abstract: Records and material pertaining to Olin Library and various other libraries on the Cornell University campus.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Includes material pertaining to FAUL (Five Associated University Libraries), CULSA (Cornell University Libraries Staff Association), the Committee on Economic Status of Librarians, South Central Research Library Council, the Olin Library Reference and Technical Services Departments; automation of library functions, particularly circulation; reclassification of library materials; memoranda and reports of the Academic Assembly; procedures and policies of the Acquisitions Department; records of various libraries on campus; and memoranda, minutes, shelving tally sheets, personnel manuals, job descriptions, evaluations, tour information, monthly reports, minutes of department staff meetings, 1974-1984; and other records of the Olin Library Circulation Department.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Olin Library Circulation Department records, #13-5-2086. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
